title: Smothered Chicken + Barley
subtitle: Baked chicken with barley, tomatoes, and lots of spices

storyboard.alt: Smothered Chicken + Barley visual continuity storyboard
storyboard.intent: Generate this first as one coherent white-background continuity board for reusable ingredients, cookware, intermediate states, and final serving. Later hero and step images should match its cookware, camera angle, repeated ingredients, cooked states, palette, and lighting. It is not a thumbnail sheet of final step images.
storyboard.camera: Use one consistent three-quarter overhead recipe-card perspective for every object: slightly above the food, looking down at a shallow angle, with cookware handles and ellipses oriented consistently left-to-right. Keep objects centered with comfortable padding and a clean white-paper background.

inventory.name: drained chopped tomatoes
inventory.description: drain and chop: 14.5 oz can tomatoes

inventory.name: spice mixture
inventory.description: combine: 1 t ground cumin + 1/2 t chili powder + 1/2 t salt + 1/2 t ground cinnamon + 1/8 t garlic powder + 1/8 t pepper

inventory.name: spice-rubbed chicken
inventory.description: rub: 6 chicken thighs + half spice mixture

inventory.name: browned chicken
inventory.description: brown: spice-rubbed chicken + 2 T olive oil

inventory.name: sauteed onion and pepper
inventory.description: saute: remaining 2 T olive oil + chopped onions + chopped red pepper

inventory.name: boiling barley mixture
inventory.description: boil: sauteed onion and pepper + 1 T soy sauce + 3 1/2 c chicken broth + 1 1/4 c uncooked barley + drained chopped tomatoes + remaining half spice mixture

inventory.name: chicken covered with barley mixture
inventory.description: pour: boiling barley mixture + browned chicken

inventory.name: baked chicken and barley
inventory.description: bake: chicken covered with barley mixture

inventory.name: smothered chicken and barley
inventory.description: rest: baked chicken and barley + sliced green onions

sequenceNotes: Step 1, Make Spice Mixture: Combine the first six ingredients in a small bowl. Result: spice mixture. Tool/station: counter, small bowl.
Step 2, Chop Onions: Chop the onions for the barley mixture. Result: chopped onions. Tool/station: knife, cutting board.
Step 3, Chop Red Pepper: Chop the red pepper for the barley mixture. Result: chopped red pepper. Tool/station: knife, cutting board.
Step 4, Prep Tomatoes: Drain and chop the tomatoes. Result: drained chopped tomatoes. Tool/station: sink, knife, cutting board.
Step 5, Rub Chicken: Rub the chicken with half the resulting spice mixture. Result: spice-rubbed chicken. Tool/station: counter.
Step 6, Brown Chicken: Brown chicken in 2 T oil in skillet over medium high heat. Remove as it browns to baking pan. Result: browned chicken. Tool/station: stovetop, skillet.
Step 7, Saute Vegetables: Add remaining oil to skillet. Saute onion and pepper a few minutes. Result: sauteed onion and pepper. Tool/station: stovetop, skillet.

Step 8, Build Barley Sauce: Add soy sauce and continue cooking a few more minutes. Add broth, barley, tomatoes, and remaining spice mixture. Bring to boil. Result: boiling barley mixture. Tool/station: stovetop, skillet.
Step 9, Assemble: Pour mixture over chicken in baking pan. Result: chicken covered with barley mixture. Tool/station: counter.
Step 10, Bake: Cover and bake 1 hour at 350 F. Result: baked chicken and barley. Tool/station: oven.
Step 11, Slice Green Onions: Slice the green onions for garnish. Result: sliced green onions. Tool/station: knife, cutting board.
Step 12, Rest And Garnish: Let stand 15 minutes before serving. Top with sliced green onions. Result: smothered chicken and barley. Tool/station: counter.
continuityRules: This storyboard is art only; do not include labels, numbers, arrows, UI cards, ingredient text, captions, panels, thumbnail frames, or visible text.
Pick a single coherent cookware set and keep it fixed across the recipe: same pan shapes, dish shapes, bowls, cutting board, and serving vessel whenever repeated.
Show repeated food states clearly enough that individual step images can reuse them without changing color, cut size, doneness, or vessel.
Use the same lighting direction, paper tone, shadows, scale, and three-quarter camera angle across all later assets.
Make one coherent white-background still-life/inventory board of reusable elements, not a contact sheet, comic strip, diagram, timeline, or set of final per-step images.
storyboard.prompt: Create one unlabeled visual continuity board for Smothered Chicken + Barley. Show the final dish, main raw ingredients, intermediate mixtures or cooked states, repeated tools/stations, and serving/garnish elements that appear in the recipe as one coherent hand-painted recipe-world reference on clean white paper. Arrange the elements in loose process order only enough to help continuity; do not draw a timeline, flowchart, labels, text, arrows, UI, frames, panels, or a grid of step thumbnails. Make cookware choices explicit through the art itself so repeated pans, bowls, dishes, boards, and tools can be reused consistently in later images.

sections.label: Covered time
sections.summary: The first task is mostly hands-off here, so the prep lane can happen during that wait.

steps.title: Make Spice Mixture
steps.instruction: Combine the first six ingredients in a small bowl.

steps.instruction: Chop the onions for the barley mixture.

steps.instruction: Chop the red pepper for the barley mixture.

steps.title: Rub Chicken
steps.instruction: Rub the chicken with half the resulting spice mixture.

steps.title: Brown Chicken
steps.instruction: Brown chicken in 2 T oil in skillet over medium high heat. Remove as it browns to baking pan.
notes: Cue: chicken browned and moved to baking pan

steps.title: Saute Vegetables
steps.instruction: Add remaining oil to skillet. Saute onion and pepper a few minutes.

steps.title: Build Barley Sauce
steps.instruction: Add soy sauce and continue cooking a few more minutes. Add broth, barley, tomatoes, and remaining spice mixture. Bring to boil.
notes: Source timing: a few more minutes, then bring to boil
Cue: mixture comes to a boil

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Pour mixture over chicken in baking pan.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Cover and bake 1 hour at 350 F.
notes: Cue: barley tender and chicken cooked

steps.title: Slice Green Onions
steps.instruction: Slice the green onions for garnish.

steps.title: Rest And Garnish
steps.instruction: Let stand 15 minutes before serving. Top with sliced green onions.
